news.title: ACE, Other Associations Urge GSA to Rescind Proposed Certification Requirements on “Unlawful DEI” and Other Issues
news.summary_en: ACE, other associations say a Trump administration proposal to require all federal funding recipients to certify they do not have unlawful DEI programs and practices would create significant uncertainty for institutions.
news.original_title: ACE, Other Associations Urge GSA to Rescind Proposed Certification Requirements on “Unlawful DEI” and Other Issues
news.summary_cn: ACE, other associations say a Trump administration proposal to require all federal funding recipients to certify they do not have unlawful DEI programs and practices would create significant uncertainty for institutions.

news.title: ACE支持法律挑战 ACTS截止日期延后
news.summary_en: ACE and 10 other higher education associations submitted an amicus brief yesterday supporting a motion brought by the plaintiffs for a stay of the IPEDS Admissions and Consumer Transparency Supplement while the court considers and decides the case.
news.original_title: ACTS Deadline Shifts as ACE, Other Associations Support Legal Challenge
news.summary_cn: 美国教育委员会（ACE）联合其他10个高等教育协会向法院提交法庭之友意见书，支持对教育部IPEDS招生与消费者透明度补充调查（ACTS）的法律挑战。法院已批准将ACTS执行截止日期延后。
